argument-expression.name: argument-expression
argument-expression.description: Transform hypotheses into structured academic arguments: paper sections, evidence chains, and literature support. Writes content in academic style with proper citations.

association-discovery.name: association-discovery
association-discovery.description: Identify relationships between knowledge items: contradictions, supplements, evolution, supports, extends, uses, similar-to (7 typed edges). Builds knowledge graph and identifies research gaps.

hypothesis-generation.name: hypothesis-generation
hypothesis-generation.description: 科学假设生成原子（HYP）—— 将研究空白转化为形式化可检验假说。包含预测、反证条件、竞争假说和实验设计。

knowledge-acquisition.name: knowledge-acquisition
knowledge-acquisition.description: Search and retrieve academic papers from multiple sources (Semantic Scholar, PubMed, Crossref, OpenAlex, arXiv). Returns paper metadata, abstracts, and PDF files.

knowledge-extraction.name: knowledge-extraction
knowledge-extraction.description: Extract structured knowledge from academic paper metadata and abstracts. Returns structured JSON with per-paper findings, methodology classification, domain tags, limitations, and field-level summary.

task-router.name: task-router
task-router.description: Synthos system entry point. Routes user queries to the correct cognitive atom chain and orchestrates execution. Agent-native — no Python code.

viewpoint-verification.name: viewpoint-verification
viewpoint-verification.description: Multi-angle verification of hypotheses and arguments: counterarguments, falsification tests, robustness checks, and weakness identification. Calculates Bayesian-inspired confidence scores.

gap-discovery.name: gap-discovery
gap-discovery.description: 研究空白发现功能（已吸收进 association-discovery v1.1.0+）

bppv-expert.name: bppv-expert
bppv-expert.description: Structured BPPV medical knowledge from AKNE knowledge graph (126 nodes, 137 edges). Covers diagnosis, repositioning maneuvers, 3D simulation, clinical workflows.

research-thinking-framework.name: research-thinking-framework
research-thinking-framework.description: Research methodology KB from AKNE: First Principles, Systems Thinking, Bayesian Thinking, Falsificationism, Model-Dependent Realism.

evolution.name: evolution
evolution.description: Self-evolution engine v2.3. Autonomous cycle: structural probes + functional benchmarks + active external absorption + lesson learning + golden validation.

figure-generation.name: figure-generation
figure-generation.description: 发表级科研图表生成——Figure契约方法论：结论Claim→证据层级→面板映射→出口契约→审核风险，再画图。16种排版模式，Nature语义色板体系。吸收自nature-figure (袁一哲, 上海交大)。

research-ideation.name: research-ideation
research-ideation.description: 研究创意发散与认知引擎——三层架构: L1(10操作框架)+L2(8认知引擎)+L3(组合协议)。合并自NanoResearch brainstorming-research-ideas + creative-thinking-for-research。

creative-cognition.name: creative-cognition
creative-cognition.description: 深层认知引擎——8种认知框架(Bisociation/重构/类比/Boden/否定反转/抽象梯塔/邻近可能/两面神)。已合并进 research-ideation v2.0.0 作为 Layer 2。

experiment-recipes.name: experiment-recipes
experiment-recipes.description: 实战ML训练配方——架构选择、训练循环、优化器配置(AdamW+Muon)、LR调度(Cosine/WSD)、混合精度、内存优化、调试检查清单(Karpathy配方)、实验管理TSV。吸收自NanoResearch ml-training-recipes。

paper-workflow.name: paper-workflow
paper-workflow.description: 人机互动论文撰写工作流。连接HYP→ARG，生成论文框架（研究空白、科学假设、技术方案、实验设计、预期结果、核心结论），人类确认后执行全流程写作。支持多版本探索模式。

latex-output.name: latex-output
latex-output.description: Convert Synthos assembled_output.json into conference-ready LaTeX (.tex, .bib, figures).
